title: 3D AI Avatar Interaction System
desc: Real-time conversational LLM avatar — the backend that makes a 3D character feel like it's actually listening. Prompt engineering, structured output validation, and WebRTC stitched together for low-latency turns.

title: Real-Time Session Management Dashboard
desc: Operator dashboard for live session telemetry. RAG-grounded responses, role-based access, and a Redis-driven event bus that keeps the UI in lockstep with the backend.

title: Health Monitoring Web Application
desc: Full-stack system for emotionally responsive medical dialogues, powered by an LLM avatar grounded in domain data. Inference deployed across AWS EC2 and Azure App Services.

bullets.rest: real-time event handling via Redis tuning
EC2 + Azure App Services for HA
